subject: Website Assistance #25185

expected_description:
AIREV's OnDemand is an all-in-one no/low-code agentic AI platform and decentralized
operating system that enables businesses to create, deploy, and manage autonomous Al agents, RAG applications, and intelligent automation workflows across cloud, on-premises, and hybrid environments. It transforms operations by automating workflows end-to-end with intelligence that learns, collaborates, and evolves in real time窶播elivering value in weeks, not months. OnDemand features a secure marketplace of 1,200+ specialized agents, visual workflow orchestration, BYOM/BYOI support, batch processing, multilingual capabilities, team collaboration, and enterprise-grade controls. Powered by Intelﾂｮ, Intelﾂｮ Xeonﾂｮ 6 processors optimize low-latency inference for smaller models (竕､10B parameters), while Intelﾂｮ Gaudiﾂｮ 3 accelerators enable high-concurrency LLM inference窶把reating a unified Al stack for faster automation, lower TCO, and enterprise-grade scalability and security.

subject: Website Assistance #25183
expected_short_description: AI Analytics at the Patient Edge
expected_description:
SymptomTrace窶冱 5G Patient Digital Twin solution transforms chronic disease management by enabling continuous, personalized care at the patient edge. Using non-invasive sensors and real-time analytics, it captures vital signs, mobility patterns, and behavioral data to create a dynamic digital twin for each patient. Unlike traditional episodic care, the solution enables proactive intervention by detecting risks such as falls or disease progression early, improving outcomes and reducing healthcare costs. Built on Intelﾂｮ Core邃｢ Ultra and Intelﾂｮ Xeonﾂｮ processors with integrated CPU, GPU, and NPU acceleration, and optimized with the OpenVINO邃｢ toolkit and Deep Learning Streamer (DL Streamer), the platform delivers efficient edge inference, secure data processing, and scalable AI
model deployment. With Intelﾂｮ Software Guard Extensions (Intelﾂｮ SGX) for secure enclaves and media acceleration for efficient data handling, healthcare providers gain real-time insights, privacy-first monitoring, and the ability to scale personalized care from hospital to home environments.

2. Efficient Data Management
3. Scalable AI Model Training
4. Reliable Home Deployment

subject: Website Assistance #25172
expected_short_description: 1U High Density Media Server for Accelerated Video Processing
expected_description: The VEGA-7030 is a highly configurable, 1U, short-depth video applications server based on the Intelﾂｮ Core邃｢ desktop processor family. Supporting up to 24 CPU cores with on-board Intelﾂｮ UHD Graphics and Intelﾂｮ Quick Sync Video functionality, the VEGA-7030 offers plenty of processing power for many software video workflows while its class-leading four PCI Express slots provide high flexibility to fit a wide range of video accelerators or video I/O cards such as the Advantech VEGA UHD encoding/acquisition cards. VEGA-7030 is ready for integration into streaming networks with three 2.5Gigabit and one Gigabit Ethernet connections and can support latest generation protocols like SRT. It has the look and feel of an appliance with user-programmable front panel LCD and keypad and a small OLED confidence monitor for video display, but inside this is a reliable server architecture with dual redundant 550W power, dual NVMe storages, and options for BMC-based remote management and secure TPM feature.
expected_features:
1. Four PCIe Slots for I/O & Accelerators
2. Four GbE Network Ports
3. Front Panel LCD Display, Keypad, and Confidence Monitor
4. Redundant Power Supplies

subject: Website Assistance #25170
expected_short_description: Parse and Enrich Unstructured Data for AI Integration
expected_description: Unstructured delivers a robust data preprocessing platform that converts unstructured data窶敗uch as PDFs, images, and emails窶琶nto structured, AI-ready formats like JSON. Leveraging advanced Optical Character Recognition (OCR) models, including PaddlePaddle and Tesseract, and vision-language model (VLM) pipelines, the platform automates data extraction, parsing, and enrichment. This enables businesses to efficiently prepare large volumes of complex data for downstream AI analytics, search, and chatbot applications. Unstructured is available as an open-source Python library, a cloud-based SaaS API, and a no-code enterprise platform, all of which integrate seamlessly with cloud storage and AI tools to provide flexible, code-free data preparation for modern enterprise workflows.
expected_features:
1. Faster Data Parsing
2. Optimized OCR Ops
3. AI-Ready Pipelines
4. Scalable On-Prem AI

subject: Website Assistance #25169
expected_short_description: AI-Driven Video Analysis for Investigative Workflows
expected_description:
Veritone Track is an AI-powered video analytics solution that enables investigative teams to efficiently analyze and correlate large volumes of recorded video from multiple sources. The platform connects
visual evidence across files, cameras, and locations to help surface relevant vehicles, appearances, and activities to reconstruct events across time and place. By generating investigative timelines that reveal movements, interactions, and contextual relationships, Veritone Track helps accelerate missing-person recovery, victim protection, vehicle-based

investigations, and digital evidence review, transforming fragmented video into actionable investigative insights.

2. Accelerated Inference
3. Multi-Stream Analysis
4. High Throughput Analytics

HawkEye2.0 by JAAN Innovations is an AI-driven, edge-intelligent smart parking platform with real-time vehicle detection, automated access control, and dynamic capacity management in high-traffic environments.
Built on Intelﾂｮ Core Ultra processors and optimized with the OpenVINO邃｢ Toolkit, HawkEye 2.0 showcases how Intel窶冱 AI-accelerated CPU architecture enables scalable, multi-stream computer vision workloads窶背ithout reliance on discrete GPUs. Leveraging existing IP cameras as intelligent sensors, advanced AI algorithms, and an API-first open platform architecture, HawkEye 2.0 integrates easily with existing infrastructure to:

笆ｪ Automate entry/exit using AI-powered ANPR

笆ｪ Track real-time bay occupancy

笆ｪ Guide drivers to nearest available space

笆ｪ Actionable insights and centralized dashboard

With edge-based AI inference, HawkEye2.0 ensures low-latency decision-making窶覇ven in bandwidth-constrained or intermittent network environments窶背hile maintaining high performance and reliability at scale.

Aktek's knowledge-based agents provide enterprises with a secure, intelligent, and efficient way to access and utilize their internal information. Purpose-built for data sensitive environments, these advanced
digital assistants can retrieve, analyze, and deliver contextually relevant insights from large internal knowledge bases. Operating entirely within an organization's secure infrastructure, they eliminate reliance on external APls while ensuring full data control and compliance. By streamlining information retrieval, improving decision-making, and preserving confidentiality, Aktek empowers organizations to unlock the true value of their internal knowledge and enhance overall operational efficiency.
